data.description:
## What
Rename with deprecation aliases + warnings: TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR->REBAR_TRACKER_DIR; COMPACT_THRESHOLD->REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD; REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS (boolean true/false default false; raise->false/warn->true; loud per-sync warning when true); REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE->REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC; REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS->REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS (clear doc); SCRATCH_BASE_DIR->REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR; REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT->REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT; REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES; RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each renamed with old-name alias honored during deprecation window + warning
- [ ] REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS value-semantics flip (raise/warn -> false/true) with alias mapping + loud warning
- [ ] Docs updated; full suite green
data.title: EV-3: rename + alias-window the user-facing vars
